step_by_step_thinking: Study models serve multiple purposes within dentistry. They can be used as references for diagnosing and treating malocclusions, showing precise details about tooth shapes, sizes, and positions which is crucial for creating custom restorations or aligners; they also play a vital role in formulating detailed treatment plans to address specific dental issues accurately. Answer Choice D: All of the above A thorough understanding shows that study models encompass all listed uses effectively.
